tagline: Localiser your repo on every commit.

hero.title: Hello dans toutes les langues
hero.lede: Lokasa oyo ebongolami na Resource Translator yango moko, na bopusi nyonso ya main, na minoko nyonso oyo Azure AI Translator esungaka.

phrases.welcome: Boyei bolamu na mobongoli ya Resource
phrases.machine_translated: Traduction automatique par Azure AI Translator.
phrases.open_pull_request: Fungola lisengi ya kobenda na babongoli ya sika.
phrases.ship_anywhere: Kotinda software na yo bisika nyonso na mokili.

features.reliable: Zonga na ba octets nionso ya ba fichiers source na yo.
features.configurable: Toni, industrie, glossaire, maloba ya kofinga — nyonso ekoki kobongisama.
features.ci_native: Ebongisami mpo na misala ya GitHub mpe misala ya kobendana.

footer.powered_by: Powered by Resource Translator and Azure AI Translator.
